title: STATUS_VOCABULARY + topoSort + status rollup SDK primitives in new roadmap-plan.ts module
body: Step 2. New module packages/pi-context/src/roadmap-plan.ts. Pure functions: STATUS_VOCABULARY mapping (interim TS-baked per FGAP-013; will eventually read from config.status_buckets when FGAP-013 lands), topoSort<T>(nodes, idOf, deps) returning { order: string[], cycles: string[][] } via Kahn's algorithm, rollupPhaseStatus(items: ItemRecord[]) returning { bucket: StatusBucket, counts, total }. New tool: project-status-rollup with params { block, ids? } — generally useful beyond roadmaps. Wired into existing pi.registerTool pattern. Unit-tested in isolation.
resolved_by: Resolved in commit b7bf11b — feat(pi-project): step 2 of roadmap/plan substrate. STATUS_VOCABULARY + topoSort + rollupPhaseStatus pure functions in new roadmap-plan.ts; project-status-rollup tool registered. 24 new tests cover all three primitives. STATUS_VOCABULARY is interim-hardcoded per FGAP-013.
